name: Chocolate Dream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare whipped topping mix according to package directions in a large mixing bowl. Add the remaining 1 1/2 cups of cold milk and pudding mix.
2. Whip until smooth, beating at high speed for 2 minutes, scraping the bowl occasionally.
3. Spoon the mixture into the pie shell. Chill for at least 4 hours.
